kill_fact: No clean kill: the catalyst is genuine, live, dated and binding, and the spread is NOT closed. FDA accepted Jazz's Ziihera (zanidatamab-hrii) sBLA with Priority Review under RTOR; PDUFA target action date Aug 25, 2026 (~57d out, NOT fired); the $250.0M Jazz milestone is contractual, tied to US GEA approval, and STILL UNPAID. Two load-bearing facts the bull/dossier got wrong. (A) FLOOR: the dossier's 'no meaningful debt / ~$5+/share hard NET cash' is false — in March 2026 Zymeworks took a $250M Royalty Pharma royalty-backed NOTE (long-term liabilities jumped from $35.7M at 12/31/25 to $278.977M at 3/31/26; $2.1M Q1 interest). The $403.8M is GROSS cash; the note is non-recourse and milestones are retained (so the $250M Jazz cash + no-equity-dilution conclusions survive), but it diverts ~30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties until Royalty Pharma is repaid 1.65-1.925x, so the 'approved-franchise/royalty' leg the $19 floor leans on is materially encumbered, not free. (B) APPROVAL ODDS: the dossier's claim that zanidatamab already has 'a separate earlier HER2+ GEA approval' and that Aug 25 is a mere 'label expansion of an already-marketed-in-GEA drug' is FALSE — Ziihera's only existing US approval is 2L biliary tract cancer (Nov 20, 2024); this PDUFA is the drug's FIRST-EVER GEA approval, a new tumor type, so the 'efficacy bar already cleared, just breadth-of-use' framing overstates the de-risking. Remains a single FDA binary with a real CRL/RTOR-pushback/AdCom tail; HERIZON-GEA-01 Phase 3 positive + Breakthrough Therapy genuinely lower (not eliminate) that risk.
corrections: (1) 'No meaningful debt' is wrong: $250M non-recourse Royalty Pharma royalty-backed note executed March 2026; long-term liabilities $278.977M at 3/31/26 vs $35.7M at 12/31/25. (2) $403.8M is GROSS cash; ~73.0M shares (not ~75M) gives ~$5.5/sh gross cash, but net-of-note cushion is thinner. (3) The $19 floor's 'approved franchise + royalty' leg is encumbered — ~30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties divert to repay the note (1.65x by 12/31/2033, 1.925x thereafter) before equity sees them; floor remains directionally defensible (non-recourse, milestones retained, funded beyond 2028, no ATM/going-concern) but is SOFTER than 'hard cash-supported.' (4) NOT a label expansion: Aug 25, 2026 is the first-ever GEA approval decision (new tumor type), not an extension of an existing GEA approval; this keeps the $250M milestone fully un-triggered/live but tempers the 'already cleared' approval-odds framing. (5) The $250M US tranche is one of up to $440M of GEA approval milestones across US/EU/JP/China; only the US tranche is dated to this PDUFA.
evidence: Jazz Pharmaceuticals press release (PR Newswire / Jazz IR, Apr 2026), 'FDA Acceptance and Priority Review of sBLA for Ziihera (zanidatamab-hrii) Combinations in First-Line HER2+ Locally Advanced or Metastatic GEA' — PDUFA target action date August 25, 2026; supported by Phase 3 HERIZON-GEA-01; reviewed under Real-Time Oncology Review.

Zymeworks Q1 2026 results (GlobeNewswire 2026-05-07 / SEC 8-K Ex-99.1, CIK 0001937653): $403.8M cash+equivalents+marketable securities at 3/31/26 ($244.3M + $159.6M); ~73.0M shares 5/6/26; $250.0M Jazz milestone on US GEA approval still pending; long-term liabilities $278.977M at 3/31/26 vs $35.7M at 12/31/25 with $2.1M Q1 interest; resources fund operations beyond 2028 assuming up to $440M anticipated GEA milestones.

Royalty Pharma / Zymeworks $250M royalty-backed note financing (executed March 2026): non-recourse note repaid from ~30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties; payoff cap ~1.65x by 12/31/2033 or ~1.925x thereafter; secured by the royalty streams — confirms the note is structured debt encumbering the franchise leg of the floor.

FDA, 'FDA grants accelerated approval to zanidatamab-hrii for previously treated unresectable or metastatic HER2-positive biliary tract cancer' (fda.gov, accelerated approval Nov 20, 2024) — confirms the ONLY existing US indication is 2L BTC, NOT GEA; the Aug 25, 2026 GEA decision is first-ever, not a label expansion.
